content: React game architecture: Phase-based state machine via useReducer is correct for linear game flows (start->setup->play->result). XState is overkill for 7 linear phases. Zustand adds unnecessary indirection for single-state-tree apps. Key patterns: split context for state/dispatch, AnimatePresence for screen transitions, ref-based touch state, action creators as custom hooks. Component boundaries: hooks handle hardware (touch), screens handle presentation, reducer handles transitions, animation variants co-located with screens.
